title: SleepInsightV3
description: Sleep use-case insight. Each prose field must cite at least one concrete number (value, baseline, delta, z-score) from the package. KPI and suggestion items carry their own 'reasoning' first property.

incomplete.description: Single completion flag. true = artifact still in-flight or failed validation. Flipped to false only by the writer as the very last step before atomic rename.

abstain_reason.description: Why abstain. Required string if abstain=true (cite data_quality numbers); null otherwise.

summary_short.description: Mobile summary, ≤120 chars. Must mention at least one concrete value.

summary_long.description: Desktop summary, ≤200 chars. Must include at least one baseline/delta reference.

analysis_today.description: Concrete description of tonight's structure (TST, efficiency, stages, latency, HR/SpO₂). Must cite ≥2 numbers from the package.

analysis_context.description: How tonight sits vs last 2 nights AND 30d baseline. Must cite ≥1 z-score or delta, AND ≥1 short-term comparison (midpoint/tst/efficiency vs last 2 nights).

reasoning.description: Why this specific action right now. Cite the data signal that triggered it.

anchor.description: The data signal this action anchors to (e.g. 'RMSSD z=-2.7'). NOT the action itself.

why.description: Mechanism / expected benefit. Different content than 'tiny'.

reasoning.description: Why this is the right longer-horizon move. Reference the multi-day pattern in the package.

kpis.description: First 3 are core in this exact order: sleep_quality, recovery_readiness, sleep_consistency. Optional 1-2 LLM-defined extras after.

reasoning.description: How value and band were derived from package data. Cite the concrete numbers used.

id.description: snake_case id. First 3 in array must be sleep_quality, recovery_readiness, sleep_consistency.

reasoning.description: Why this confidence value: data quality, baseline coverage, persistence.
